description: SCHUMANN PREDICTION REVERSAL. W027/PRED-R006 (G3+ storm SR elevation) explicitly falsified. Original prediction: storms elevate Schumann resonance amplitude. Actual observation: storms SUPPRESS SR amplitude by 30%+. Replaced with PRED-SR-SUPPRESS model. This is notable honesty — they're acknowledging a failed prediction and replacing it rather than silently removing it.
before: W027: G3+ geomagnetic storms elevate Schumann resonance amplitude
after: W027 falsified March 2026. Opposite effect observed. Replaced with PRED-SR-SUPPRESS: storms suppress SR amplitude 30%+
analyst_priority: MEDIUM — impacts our WIN-061 analysis. Need to verify whether this changes our Schumann arguments.
